project_type: FunPay Cardinal (FPC) plugin - single Python file plugin for SMM service reselling via smmway.ru API
build_system: None (single-file FPC plugin, loaded by Cardinal at runtime)
verification_instructions: 1. Run py_compile to confirm no syntax errors. 2. Run ast.parse to confirm valid AST. 3. Verify BIND_TO hooks are properly defined as lists.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - single Python file plugin
environment_constraints: No FPC runtime available - can only validate via AST/syntax checking
contribution_requirements: Single file plugin, all code in one .py file
key_patterns: FPC plugin conventions: BIND_TO_PRE_INIT=[func], BIND_TO_NEW_ORDER=[func], BIND_TO_NEW_MESSAGE=[func], BIND_TO_DELETE=[func] (all should be lists). COMMANDS dict maps command names to descriptions. init_tg_menu() registers Telegram bot handlers. CTX singleton for plugin state.
directory_structure: Single file repository: smmway_v1.3.11 (2).py is the entire plugin, README.md is empty
